220101.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏌᏩᏂ ᏈᏓ, ᎠᎸᎾᏝᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎦᏥᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎨᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎣᎩᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᏁ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
220101.english: Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ, to them that have obtained like precious faith with us through the righteousness of God and our Saviour Jesus Christ:
220101.phonetic: A-yv Sa-wa-ni Qui-da, a-lv-na-tla-i a-le a-gi-nv-si-dv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, ga-tsi-yo-we-la-si na-s-gi na ge-tsi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi o-gi-ne-lv na-s-gi-ya-i, ga-lv-quo-di-yu go-hi-yu-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-ne u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv I-ga-ne-la-nv-hi a-le I-gi-s-de-li-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

220102.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎡᏥᏁᏉᎡᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
220102.english: Grace and peace be multiplied unto you through the knowledge of God, and of Jesus our Lord,
220102.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv e-tsi-ne-quo-e-di ge-se-s-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le Tsi-sa i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

220103.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏩᏔᏅᎢ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏕᏛᏅ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎩᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏍᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
220103.english: According as his divine power hath given unto us all things that pertain unto life and godliness, through the knowledge of him that hath called us to glory and virtue:
220103.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya u-tse-li u-li-ni-gi-di ge-sv u-wa-ta-nv-i i-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di de-dv-nv u-gv-wa-li a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi na i-gi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi gv-ta-nv-hi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv a-le du-yu-go-dv i-s-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i.

220104.cherokee: ᎤᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏔᏅᎯ ᎡᏉᎯᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᎩᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏕᏨᏗᏍᎬ ᎨᏣᏠᏯ ᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ, ᎡᏣᏗᏫᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏲᎢ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏤᎭ ᎠᏚᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ.
220104.english: Whereby are given unto us exceeding great and precious promises: that by these ye might be partakers of the divine nature, having escaped the corruption that is in the world through lust.
220104.phonetic: U-s-gi na-hna wu-da-go-na-dv-ta-nv-hi e-quo-hi-yu a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu e-gi-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi hi-a de-tsv-di-s-gv ge-tsa-tlo-ya s-do-di yi-ni-ga-li-s-da U-ne-la-nv-hi nu-s-dv-i, e-tsa-di-wi-se-lv-hi ge-sv u-yo-i e-lo-hi tse-ha a-du-lv-di ge-sv tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga.

220105.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᎶᏟᏂᎬᏁᎲ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
220105.english: And beside this, giving all diligence, add to your faith virtue; and to virtue knowledge;
220105.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-tsa-ti i-lo-tli-ni-gv-ne-hv i-tso-hi-yu-sv ta-li i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i; a-le du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv ta-li i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i;

220106.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
220106.english: And to knowledge temperance; and to temperance patience; and to patience godliness;
220106.phonetic: A-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-no ge-sv ta-li i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di a-li-si-na-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i; a-li-si-na-hi-s-do-di-no ge-sv ta-li i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di di-tsv-ni-di-yu ge-sv-i; di-tsv-ni-di-yu-no ge-sv ta-li i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv-i;

220107.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏢ ᏗᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏢᏃ ᏗᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏂᎢᏛᏉ ᏗᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
220107.english: And to godliness brotherly kindness; and to brotherly kindness charity.
220107.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-no ga-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv ta-li i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di a-na-li-nv-tlv di-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i; a-na-li-nv-tlv-no di-ge-yu-di ge-sv ta-li i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di i-gv-ni-i-dv-quo di-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i.

220108.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎣᏤᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏱᎧᏁᏉᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎬᏂᏌ ᎥᏝ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏃᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏥᏁᏉᏣᏛᎾ ᏱᎦᎩ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ.
220108.english: For if these things be in you, and abound, they make you that ye shall neither be barren nor unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
220108.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no na-s-gi hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv o-tse-ha a-le yi-ka-ne-quo-ga, na-s-gi yi-ni-gv-ni-sa v-tla i-tsi-s-ga-no-lv a-le ni-tsi-ne-quo-tsa-dv-na yi-ga-gi a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga.

220109.cherokee: ᏄᏪᎲᎾᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏫᏉ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᎨᏫᏒᎯ ᎠᏥᏅᎦᎸᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏥᏙᎸᎢ.
220109.english: But he that lacketh these things is blind, and cannot see afar off, and hath forgotten that he was purged from his old sins.
220109.phonetic: Nu-we-hv-na-s-gi-ni na-s-gi hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv na-s-gi di-ge-wi-quo a-le i-yv-dv gv-wa-go-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na, a-le u-wa-ge-wi-sv-hi a-tsi-nv-ga-lv-dv ge-sv i-lv-hi-yu u-s-ga-nv-tsi-do-lv-i.

220110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎢᏣᏟᏂᎬᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎢᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᎡᏥᏯᏅᎲ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏣᏑᏰᏒᎢ; ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏱᏂᏣᏛᏁᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏱᏙᎨᏥᏅᎩ.
220110.english: Wherefore the rather, brethren, give diligence to make your calling and election sure: for if ye do these things, ye shall never fall:
220110.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-da-li-nv-tli u-tli i-ga-i i-tsa-tli-ni-gv-ne-he-s-di nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na i-tsv-ne-di-yi e-tsi-ya-nv-hv a-le e-tsa-su-ye-sv-i; i-yu-ye-no hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv yi-ni-tsa-dv-ne-ha, v-tla i-lv-hi-yu yi-do-ge-tsi-nv-gi.

220111.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎡᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏗᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
220111.english: For so an entrance shall be ministered unto you abundantly into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.
220111.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv u-tsa-ta-nv-hi e-tsi-ne-di ge-se-s-di i-tsi-yv-s-di-yi u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na U-gv-wi-yu-hi di-ge-sv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-le I-gi-s-de-li-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

220112.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏴᏓᎨᎵᏏ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎢᏨᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎢᏥᎦᎳᎭᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᎵᏂᎪᏒ ᎾᎿᎭᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎪᎯ ᏥᏣᏛᎩᎭ.
220112.english: Wherefore I will not be negligent to put you always in remembrance of these things, though ye know them, and be established in the present truth.
220112.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di v-tla u-ne-la-gi yv-da-ge-li-si ni-go-hi-lv i-tsv-ya-nv-da-di-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv, i-tsi-ga-la-ha-s-gi-ni-no-nv, a-le de-tsa-li-ni-go-sv na-hna du-yu-go-dv ge-sv go-hi tsi-tsa-dv-gi-ha.

220113.cherokee: ᎥᎥ, ᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᎨᎵᎭ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎠᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎦᎵᏦᏛ ᏥᏯᎥᎢ, ᎢᏨᏰᏍᏛᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᏨᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
220113.english: Yea, I think it meet, as long as I am in this tabernacle, to stir you up by putting you in remembrance;
220113.phonetic: V-v, du-yu-go-di ge-li-ha i-go-hi-dv a-ni hi-a ga-li-tso-dv tsi-ya-v-i, i-tsv-ye-s-dv-do-di-yi i-tsv-ya-nv-da-di-s-di-s-gv-i;

220114.cherokee: ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᏥᎦᏔᎲ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᎩᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᏋᏁᎸᎢ.
220114.english: Knowing that shortly I must put off this my tabernacle, even as our Lord Jesus Christ hath shewed me.
220114.phonetic: Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv tsi-ga-ta-hv ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo i-yv-dv a-gi-di-yi ge-sv a-qua-tse-li ga-li-tso-dv-i, na-s-gi-ya U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-ni-ge-sv na-quv-ne-lv-i.

220115.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏓᎦᏟᏂᎬᏁᎵ ᎠᎩᎶᏐᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎨᏨᎨᏫᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ.
220115.english: Moreover I will endeavour that ye may be able after my decease to have these things always in remembrance.
220115.phonetic: A-le da-ga-tli-ni-gv-ne-li a-gi-lo-so-nv-hi ge-se-s-di ni-go-hi-lv ge-tsv-ge-wi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv.

220116.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏎᏉ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏲᎩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏴᏁᎸ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ; ᏱᎩᎪᎲᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
220116.english: For we have not followed cunningly devised fables, when we made known unto you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, but were eyewitnesses of his majesty.
220116.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no a-li-si-na-hi-s-ta-nv-hi a-se-quo ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv yo-gi-s-da-wa-dv-se gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-yv-ne-lv u-li-ni-gi-di ge-sv a-le u-lu-hi-s-di ge-sv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv; yi-gi-go-hv-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv u-tse-li-ga.

220117.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎦᏚᎸᏌᏛᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎧᏁᎬ ᏧᎷᏤᎸ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᎦ-ᏚᎸᏌᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᎤᎯ, [ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎩ,] ᎯᎠ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎠᏇᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏥᏰᎸᎢ ᏥᎩ.
220117.english: For he received from God the Father honour and glory, when there came such a voice to him from the excellent glory, This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.
220117.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no A-ga-yv-li-ge u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv a-le i-ga-du-lv-sa-dv-i, na-hi-yu ka-ne-gv tsu-lu-tse-lv u-tsa-ti ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-ga--du-lv-sa-dv nv-da-yu-da-le-u-hi, [hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-s-gv-gi,] Hi-a tsi-ge-yu-i A-que-tsi, na-s-gi o-si-yu tsi-ye-lv-i tsi-gi.

220118.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ ᎣᎦᏛᎦᏅᎩ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎣᏓᎸ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎣᏤᏙᎲᎢ.
220118.english: And this voice which came from heaven we heard, when we were with him in the holy mount.
220118.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a u-ne-tsv ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi o-ga-dv-ga-nv-gi, na-hi-yu ga-lv-quo-di o-da-lv i-tsu-la-ha o-tse-do-hv-i.

220119.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᎢᎩᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᏂᏣᏛᎦ ᏱᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏔᏅ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎦ-ᏚᎸᏌᏛ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᏨᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎢᎦ ᏓᎦᏙᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏑᎾᎴ ᎡᎯ ᏃᏈᏏ ᏓᎧᎸᎩ ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ;
220119.english: We have also a more sure word of prophecy; whereunto ye do well that ye take heed, as unto a light that shineth in a dark place, until the day dawn, and the day star arise in your hearts:
220119.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo u-tli i-ga-i nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na ka-no-he-dv a-do-le-ho-sv-hi i-gi-ha, na-s-gi o-si-yu yi-ni-tsa-dv-ga yi-tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-ta-nv na-s-gi-ya i-ga--du-lv-sa-dv u-li-si-gv tsv-ga-sa-ya-s-di-s-go-i, gv-ni i-ga da-ga-do-gi, a-le su-na-le e-hi no-qui-si da-ka-lv-gi di-tsi-na-wi-yi;

220120.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᎦᏙᎥᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏅ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎬᏁᏢᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
220120.english: Knowing this first, that no prophecy of the scripture is of any private interpretation.
220120.phonetic: I-gv-yi na-s-gi hi-a ni-tsi-ga-do-v-se-s-di na-s-gi sa-quo u-nv a-do-le-ho-sv-hi go-we-lv-i u-wa-sv ge-sv di-gv-ne-tlv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

220121.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒᏰᏃ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏴᏗᏓᎴᏁᎢ; ᎠᏃᏍᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᏂᏁᎨ ᎢᏳᏂᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᏄᏅᏁᎲ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ.
220121.english: For the prophecy came not in old time by the will of man: but holy men of God spake as they were moved by the Holy Ghost.
220121.phonetic: U-na-do-le-ho-sv-ye-no i-lv-hi-yu tsi-ge-se-i v-tla yv-wi-quo a-da-nv-te-s-gv yv-di-da-le-ne-i; a-no-s-dv-s-gi-ni a-ni-s-ga-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga a-ni-ne-ge i-yu-ni-we-s-di-yi nu-nv-ne-hv Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do.

220201.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏩᎾᏓᏑᏰ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏗᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏣᏓᏑᏴᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎤᏂᏴᏔᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏛᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎾᏓᏱᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎾᎫᏴᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎢᏳᏅᏂᏌᏛ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏞᎩᏳ ᎤᏂᏛᏗᏍᎩ.
220201.english: But there were false prophets also among the people, even as there shall be false teachers among you, who privily shall bring in damnable heresies, even denying the Lord that bought them, and bring upon themselves swift destruction.
220201.phonetic: A-se-no u-na-tlo-na-s-di a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi i-gv-wa-na-da-su-ye yv-wi, na-s-gi-ya u-na-tlo-na-s-di di-na-de-yo-hv-s-gi ge-tsa-da-su-yv-di tsi-gi, na-s-gi u-de-li-dv u-ni-yv-ta-ni-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di u-na-da-tse-li-dv ge-sv a-da-dv-di-s-gi, na-s-gi a-na-da-yi-he-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-na-gu-yv-dv, a-le u-nv-sv i-yu-nv-ni-sa-dv u-ni-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di tle-gi-yu u-ni-dv-di-s-gi.

220202.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗ ᏛᏂᏍᏓᏩᏕᏏ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏛᏗᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏛᏅᏂᏌᏂ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏅᏃᎯ ᎤᏂᏐᏢᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
220202.english: And many shall follow their pernicious ways; by reason of whom the way of truth shall be evil spoken of.
220202.phonetic: A-le u-ni-tsa-te-s-di dv-ni-s-da-wa-de-si na-s-gi u-na-tse-li a-da-dv-di-s-gi; na-s-gi nv-dv-nv-ni-sa-ni du-yu-go-dv nv-no-hi u-ni-so-tlv-i-s-do-di ge-se-s-di.

220203.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏂᎬᎥᏍᎬ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏄᎮᏛ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎦᏃᏙᏗ ᏓᎨᏥᏰᎸᏥ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏚᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏘ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏯᎵᎾᎯᏍᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᎸᏍᎦ.
220203.english: And through covetousness shall they with feigned words make merchandise of you: whose judgment now of a long time lingereth not, and their damnation slumbereth not.
220203.phonetic: A-le tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-ni-gv-v-s-gv i-yu-s-di, a-le ga-lo-nu-he-dv a-nv-di-s-gv a-ni-wo-ni-s-gv ga-no-do-di da-ge-tsi-ye-lv-tsi; na-s-gi tsu-na-du-go-da-ne-di ge-sv e-ti nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv v-tla ya-li-na-hi-s-di-ha, a-le u-ni-dv-di-s-gi v-tla yi-ga-lv-s-ga.

220204.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ  ᏂᏚᎨᏳᏅᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ ᏗᏂᎧᎾᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ, ᏨᏍᎩᏃᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏫᏚᏓᎢᏅᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᏲᏎ ᏧᏓᏕᏒᏛ ᏗᎨᎦᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᎨᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᎨᎫᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎢ,
220204.english: For if God spared not the angels that sinned, but cast them down to hell, and delivered them into chains of darkness, to be reserved unto judgment;
220204.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no  ni-du-ge-yu-nv-na tsi-ge-se di-ni-ka-na-wa-di-do-hi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi, tsv-s-gi-no-quo-s-gi-ni tsi-wi-du-da-i-nv-se-i, a-le tsi-du-yo-se tsu-da-de-sv-dv di-ge-ga-lv-s-do-di-yi u-li-si-gv ge-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi di-ge-gu-go-da-ne-di ge-sv i-yu-i,

220205.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏄᎨᏳᏅᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎡᏘ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᏃᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏁᎳ ᏧᏛᏕᎢ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏗᎧᎾᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᏃᎱᎪᏔᏁ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ,
220205.english: And spared not the old world, but saved Noah the eighth person, a preacher of righteousness, bringing in the flood upon the world of the ungodly;
220205.phonetic: A-le nu-ge-yu-nv-na tsi-ge-se e-ti e-lo-hi tsi-ge-se-i, No-ya-s-gi-ni tsu-ne-la tsu-dv-de-i ge-sv na-s-gi a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gi du-yu-go-dv di-ka-na-wa-di-do-hi tsi-ge-se-i, a-le tsi-du-no-hu-go-ta-ne e-lo-hi a-ni-s-ga-na a-ne-hv-i,

220206.cherokee: ᏐᏓᎻᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎹᎵ ᏕᎦᏚᎲ ᎪᏍᏚ ᏥᏂᏚᏩᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᏭᎪᏓᏁᎴ ᏧᎷᏆᏗᏅᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏯᏔᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᏚᏩᏁᎴ ᎣᏂ ᎤᎾᏕᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᏚᎾᏁᎶᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ,
220206.english: And turning the cities of Sodom and Gomorrha into ashes condemned them with an overthrow, making them an ensample unto those that after should live ungodly;
220206.phonetic: So-da-mi-no a-le Go-ma-li de-ga-du-hv go-s-du tsi-ni-du-wa-ne-le-i, a-le tsi-du-wu-go-da-ne-le tsu-lu-qua-di-nv-di-yi, a-le na-s-gi u-ne-ya-ta-hv-s-gi tsi-ni-du-wa-ne-le o-ni u-na-de-di u-ne-la-nv-hi ni-du-na-ne-lo-dv-na ge-sv-i,

220207.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎶᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᏧᏭᏓᎴᏎᎢ, ᎤᏕᏯᏔᏁᎸ ᏄᎾᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎠᏂᏍᏚᎾᎢ.
220207.english: And delivered just Lot, vexed with the filthy conversation of the wicked:
220207.phonetic: A-le Lo-di u-da-nv-ti tsu-wu-da-le-se-i, u-de-ya-ta-ne-lv nu-na-li-si-na-hi-s-dv-na a-ne-hv a-ni-s-du-na-i.

220208.cherokee: (ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏤᎮᎢ, ᎠᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏛᎩᏍᎬ [ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ] ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏖ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ,)
220208.english: (For that righteous man dwelling among them, in seeing and hearing, vexed his righteous soul from day to day with their unlawful deeds;)
220208.phonetic: (Na-s-gi-ye-no u-da-nv-ti a-s-ga-ya a-ne-hv tse-he-i, a-go-wa-ti-s-gv a-le a-dv-gi-s-gv [nu-s-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i] u-da-nv-ti u-da-nv-do ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv u-de-ya-do-di u-da-nv-te nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge ni-du-yu-go-dv-na du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i,)

220209.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏧᏭᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᏂᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏰᎢᎵᏙᎲᎢ, ᎤᏂᏲᏃ ᏧᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ:
220209.english: The Lord knoweth how to deliver the godly out of temptations, and to reserve the unjust unto the day of judgment to be punished:
220209.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ga-ta-ha i-yu-dv-ne-di-yi tsu-wu-da-le-s-di-yi u-na-da-nv-ti u-ni-go-li-ye-s-gi u-ni-ye-i-li-do-hv-i, u-ni-yo-no tsu-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi ge-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-do-di-yi di-gu-go-do-di-yi i-ga ge-se-s-di:

220210.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎭ [ᎨᏂᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ] ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᏂᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᎤᏂᎬᎥᏍᎬ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏍᎦᎩ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ.  ᎤᏂᏍᎦᎢᏍᏗ, ᎤᏅᏒ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎤᏂᎸᏉᏗ; ᎥᏝ ᏯᏂᏍᎦᎢᎭ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏐᏢᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ.
220210.english: But chiefly them that walk after the flesh in the lust of uncleanness, and despise government. Presumptuous are they, selfwilled, they are not afraid to speak evil of dignities.
220210.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi ho u-gv-wi-yu-ha [ge-ni-gi-li-yo-i-s-do-di ge-se-s-di] u-que-da-li a-ni-s-da-wa-de-gi u-ni-gv-v-s-gv ga-da-ha ge-sv-i, a-le di-ni-s-ga-gi nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi.  U-ni-s-ga-i-s-di, u-nv-sv a-na-da-nv-te-s-gv u-ni-lv-quo-di; v-tla ya-ni-s-ga-i-ha di-gv-wa-ni-so-tlv-do-di-yi ge-tsi-lv-quo-di.

220211.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏧᎾᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏐᏅ ᏱᏓᏂᎳᏫᏎᎰ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
220211.english: Whereas angels, which are greater in power and might, bring not railing accusation against them before the Lord.
220211.phonetic: Di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-s-gi-ni u-tli i-tsu-na-li-ni-gi-dv tsi-gi v-tla go-hu-s-di u-so-nv yi-da-ni-la-wi-se-ho U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i.

220212.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗᏉ ᏤᎿᎭᎠ ᎨᎪᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᎨᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏛᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏐᏢᎢᏍᏗᎪ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏃᎵᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏛᎾᎵᏛᏔᏂ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᏂᏲᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
220212.english: But these, as natural brute beasts, made to be taken and destroyed, speak evil of the things that they understand not; and shall utterly perish in their own corruption;
220212.phonetic: Hi-a-s-gi-ni na-s-gi-ya go-hu-s-di-quo tse-hna-a ge-go-tlv-nv-hi ge-ge-i-s-di-yi a-le ge-tsi-dv-do-di-yi, na-s-gi a-ni-so-tlv-i-s-di-go tsu-da-le-nv-dv na-no-li-gv-na ge-sv-i, a-le dv-na-li-dv-ta-ni u-nv-sv u-ni-yo-i-yu ge-sv-i.

220213.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏛᏂᏩᏛᎯ ᎨᎦᎫᏴᏓᏁᏗ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ [ᎨᎦᎫᏴᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ] ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏥᏰᎸᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏧᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ.  ᏥᏚᏓᏓᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏧᏍᏙᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᎭ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎠᎾᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ.
220213.english: And shall receive the reward of unrighteousness, as they that count it pleasure to riot in the day time. Spots they are and blemishes, sporting themselves with their own deceivings while they feast with you;
220213.phonetic: A-le dv-ni-wa-dv-hi ge-ga-gu-yv-da-ne-di ni-du-yu-go-dv-na du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya [ge-ga-gu-yv-da-ne-di tsi-gi] o-si-yu u-tsi-ye-lv-hi i-ga ge-sv o-s-dv tsu-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi.  Tsi-du-da-da-lo-i a-le go-hu-s-di tsu-s-do-i na-s-gi-ya-i, o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-ha u-nv-sv a-na-da-li-da-s-di-s-gv-i, na-hi-yu i-tsu-la-ha i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i.

220214.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎦᏙᎵ ᏧᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎠᏓᏲᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏲᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎨᏒᎢ:  ᏗᏂᎶᏄᎮᏍᎩ ᏂᏚᎾᎵᏂᎬᎬᎾ ᎦᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᏧᎩᏌᏛ ᎠᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏪᏥ,
220214.english: Having eyes full of adultery, and that cannot cease from sin; beguiling unstable souls: an heart they have exercised with covetous practices; cursed children:
220214.phonetic: Di-ni-ga-do-li tsu-ka-li-tsv-hi a-da-yo-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le di-gv-wa-ni-yo-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na a-s-ga-ni ge-sv-i:  di-ni-lo-nu-he-s-gi ni-du-na-li-ni-gv-gv-na ga-na-da-nv-dv-i; tsu-ni-na-wi tsu-gi-sa-dv a-gv-v-hi-s-di di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i; a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv tsu-we-tsi,

220215.cherokee: ᎤᏅᏕᏨ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎦᏅᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎴᏲᎥ, ᎤᏂᏍᏓᏩᏕᏅ ᎤᎶᏒ ᏇᎳᎻ ᏉᏌ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᏧᏰᎸᏎ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎫᏴᏗ,
220215.english: Which have forsaken the right way, and are gone astray, following the way of Balaam the son of Bosor, who loved the wages of unrighteousness;
220215.phonetic: U-nv-de-tsv du-yu-go-dv ga-nv-nv-i, a-le u-na-le-yo-v, u-ni-s-da-wa-de-nv u-lo-sv Que-la-mi Quo-sa u-we-tsi, o-si-yu tsu-ye-lv-se ni-du-yu-go-dv-na di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv a-gu-yv-di,

220216.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏥᎬᏍᎪᎸᏁ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ: ᎤᏩᎨᏫ ᏗᎦᎵᎠᏅᎯᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᎤᏩᏔᏁ ᎤᏁᏤᎢ, ᎤᏍᎦᏤ ᏄᏓᏅᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ.
220216.english: But was rebuked for his iniquity: the dumb ass speaking with man's voice forbad the madness of the prophet.
220216.phonetic: A-se-no a-tsi-gv-s-go-lv-ne u-s-ga-nv-tsv-i: u-wa-ge-wi di-ga-li-a-nv-hi-dv yv-wi u-ne-i-s-di u-wa-ta-ne u-ne-tse-i, u-s-ga-tse nu-da-nv-dv-na ge-sv a-do-le-ho-s-gi.

220217.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏔᎴᏒ ᎠᎹ-ᏗᏢᏗᏱ ᎠᎹ ᏂᏗᎦᏁᎲᎾ, [ᎠᎴ] ᎤᎶᎩᎸ ᎤᏃᎴ ᏧᏃᎸᏔᏂᏙᎰᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎬᎾᎨ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᏥᎨᎦᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
220217.english: These are wells without water, clouds that are carried with a tempest; to whom the mist of darkness is reserved for ever.
220217.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi da-ta-le-sv a-ma--di-tlv-di-yi a-ma ni-di-ga-ne-hv-na, [a-le] u-lo-gi-lv u-no-le tsu-no-lv-ta-ni-do-ho-i, na-s-gi na gv-na-ge u-li-si-gv tsi-ge-ga-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-lv u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na.

220218.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏁᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏢᏆᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ, ᏓᏂᎶᏄᎮᏍᎪ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᏚᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, [ᎠᎴ] ᏃᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏛᎾ ᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᏗᏳᎯ ᏧᎾᏗᏫᏎᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏏ ᎤᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎾᎴᏂᏙᎯ ᏥᎩ.
220218.english: For when they speak great swelling words of vanity, they allure through the lusts of the flesh, through much wantonness, those that were clean escaped from them who live in error.
220218.phonetic: A-ni-ne-gi-ye-no u-tsa-ti a-tlv-qua-s-di go-hu-s-di gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na a-ni-wo-ni-s-gv-i, da-ni-lo-nu-he-s-go a-nv-di-s-go u-que-da-li a-du-lv-di ge-sv-i, [a-le] no-li-si-na-hi-s-dv-na ni-da-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-do-di-yu-hi tsu-na-di-wi-se-lv-hi na-s-gi na a-si u-da-li-da-s-di ge-sv a-na-le-ni-do-hi tsi-gi.

220219.cherokee: ᏓᏂᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎰ ᏗᎨᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎤᏅᏒᏃ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᎾᏝᎢ ᎨᏐᎢ:  ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎠᏥᏎᎪᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏎᎪᎩᏛ ᎤᎾᏝᎢ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
220219.english: While they promise them liberty, they themselves are the servants of corruption: for of whom a man is overcome, of the same is he brought in bondage.
220219.phonetic: Da-ni-du-i-s-da-ne-ho di-ge-tsi-na-tla-i ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, u-nv-sv-no u-yo ge-sv di-gv-wa-ni-na-tla-i ge-so-i:  gi-lo-ye-no a-tsi-se-go-gi na-s-gi na u-se-go-gi-dv u-na-tla-i ni-ga-li-s-di-s-go-i.

220220.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏗᏫᏎᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ, ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᏱᎤᏁᏒ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏱᎨᏥᏎᎪᎩᏒ, ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏟ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ.
220220.english: For if after they have escaped the pollutions of the world through the knowledge of the Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ, they are again entangled therein, and overcome, the latter end is worse with them than the beginning.
220220.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no u-na-di-wi-se-lv-hi yi-gi ga-da-ha ge-sv e-lo-hi e-hi, a-nv-di-s-gv a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-le I-gi-s-de-li-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, ta-li-ne-no yi-u-ne-sv na-hna-ni a-le yi-ge-tsi-se-go-gi-sv, u-li-s-qua-lv-di nu-na-li-s-da-ne-lv u-tli u-yo-i-yu e-s-ga-quo i-gv-yi-yi.

220221.cherokee: ᎤᏟᏰᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ ᏄᏂᎦᏙᎥᏒᎾ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎦᏅᏅᎢ, ᎠᏃ ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᏒᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏯᎾᎦᏔᎲ ᏱᏚᏂᏲᏍᎦ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ.
220221.english: For it had been better for them not to have known the way of righteousness, than, after they have known it, to turn from the holy commandment delivered unto them.
220221.phonetic: U-tli-ye-no o-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di yi-ge-se-i nu-ni-ga-do-v-sv-na yi-ge-se du-yu-go-dv ga-nv-nv-i, a-no u-ni-ga-do-v-sv-hi ge-sv ya-na-ga-ta-hv yi-du-ni-yo-s-ga ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-s-gi di-ge-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv-hi.

220222.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎩᎵ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏚᎵᎦᏍᏔᏅ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏮᎠᎦᏔᎲᏍᏓ; ᏏᏉᏃ ᎠᎪᏑᎴᎥᎯ ᎤᏓᏬᏍᏗᏱ ᏝᏬᏚᎯ ᏮᎠᎦᏔᎲᏍᏓ.
220222.english: But it is happened unto them according to the true proverb, The dog is turned to his own vomit again; and the sow that was washed to her wallowing in the mire.
220222.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-gi-ya nu-na-li-s-da-ne-lv hi-a u-do-hi-yu-hi i-ga-we-dv tsi-gi, gi-li u-wa-sv du-li-ga-s-ta-nv ta-li-ne wv-a-ga-ta-hv-s-da; si-quo-no a-go-su-le-v-hi u-da-wo-s-di-yi tla-wo-du-hi wv-a-ga-ta-hv-s-da.

220301.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᏕᏨᏰᏍᏓᏁ ᎤᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ,
220301.english: This second epistle, beloved, I now write unto you; in both which I stir up your pure minds by way of remembrance:
220301.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi ta-li-ne go-we-li hna-quo i-tsv-yo-we-la-si i-tsv-ge-yu-i; na-s-gi na-hna de-tsv-ye-s-da-ne u-tlo-na-s-di ni-ge-sv-na de-tsa-da-nv-dv na-s-gi i-tsv-ya-nv-da-di-s-di-s-gv-i,

220302.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᏛ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏦᎦᏕᏲᏅᎯ ᎣᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ.
220302.english: That ye may be mindful of the words which were spoken before by the holy prophets, and of the commandment of us the apostles of the Lord and Saviour:
220302.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsa-nv-da-di-s-di-yi ka-no-he-dv i-lv-hi-yu u-ni-no-he-dv ge-tsi-lv-quo-di a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-le a-yv tso-ga-de-yo-nv-hi o-gi-nv-si-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-le Di-s-de-li-s-gi.

220303.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎢᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏅᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᏐᏢᎢᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏚᎸᏅᎥᏍᎬ ᎠᏂᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ,
220303.english: Knowing this first, that there shall come in the last days scoffers, walking after their own lusts,
220303.phonetic: Hi-a nu-s-de-s-di i-gv-yi i-tsa-nv-te-s-di, na-s-gi u-li-s-qua-nv-di ge-se-s-di u-ni-lu-hi-s-di ge-sv a-ni-so-tlv-i-s-di-s-gi u-nv-sv u-na-du-lv-nv-v-s-gv a-ni-s-da-wa-de-gi,

220304.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏯᏂᏪᏍᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ?  ᎠᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᎬᏩᏂᎵᏅᏨᎯ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᎴᏅᏛ, ᏅᏩᏍᏗᏉ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏥᏄᏍᏛᏉ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᎲ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᏅ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ.
220304.english: And saying, Where is the promise of his coming? for since the fathers fell asleep, all things continue as they were from the beginning of the creation.
220304.phonetic: A-le hi-a i-ya-ni-we-s-gi, Ga-do u-li-s-ta-nv u-lu-hi-s-di-yi u-du-i-s-ta-nv-i?  A-ni-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no gv-wa-ni-li-nv-tsv-hi nv-da-gv-wa-le-nv-dv, nv-wa-s-di-quo ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di tsi-nu-s-dv-quo tsu-da-le-nv-hv u-wo-tlv-nv-nv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv.

220305.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏚᎸᏛ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᏨ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᎹᏱ ᎦᏚ ᏧᎦᏚᏕᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏭᎯ ᏥᎦᏙᎨᎢ;
220305.english: For this they willingly are ignorant of, that by the word of God the heavens were of old, and the earth standing out of the water and in the water:
220305.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no u-nv-sv u-na-du-lv-dv na-ni-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-tsv nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv ga-lv-lo i-lv-hi-yu tsi-ge-se-i a-le e-lo-hi a-ma-yi ga-du tsu-ga-du-de-i, a-le a-wu-hi tsi-ga-do-ge-i;

220306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎠᎹᏱᎭ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎤᏲᏤᎢ.
220306.english: Whereby the world that then was, being overflowed with water, perished:
220306.phonetic: Na-s-gi e-lo-hi na-hi-yu tsi-ge-se a-ma-yi-ha tsi-nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, u-yo-tse-i.

220307.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎤᏁᏨ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏓᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ, ᎠᏥᎸᏱ ᏭᎾᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏓᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎬᏂ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏛᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᏚᎾᏁᎶᏛᎾ.
220307.english: But the heavens and the earth, which are now, by the same word are kept in store, reserved unto fire against the day of judgment and perdition of ungodly men.
220307.phonetic: a-se-no ga-lv-lo-i a-le e-lo-hi go-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi-quo u-ne-tsv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha da-s-qua-ni-go-di, a-tsi-lv-yi wu-na-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di-yi da-s-qua-ni-go-di gv-ni di-gu-go-do-di-yi i-ga ge-se-s-di a-le ge-tsi-dv-do-di-yi a-ni-s-ga-ya u-ne-la-nv-hi ni-du-na-ne-lo-dv-na.

220308.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏑᏓᎴᎩ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾᏉ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏙᏗᎧᏂᏍᎬ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎤᏠᏱ, ᏌᏉᏃ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏠᏱ.
220308.english: But, beloved, be not ignorant of this one thing, that one day is with the Lord as a thousand years, and a thousand years as one day.
220308.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsv-ge-yu-i, hi-a na-s-gi su-da-le-gi tle-s-di ni-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na-quo yi-ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi sa-quo i-ga ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi do-di-ka-ni-s-gv sa-quo i-ya-ga-yv-li i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv u-tlo-yi, sa-quo-no i-ya-ga-yv-li i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv sa-quo i-ga ge-sv u-tlo-yi.

220309.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏍᎦᏃᎵᏳ ᏱᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎦᏃᎳ ᏣᏁᎵᎭ, ᎬᏂᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᎦᏘᏴᎢ, ᏄᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
220309.english: The Lord is not slack concerning his promise, as some men count slackness; but is longsuffering to us-ward, not willing that any should perish, but that all should come to repentance.
220309.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi v-tla u-s-ga-no-li-yu yi-gi nu-s-dv u-du-i-s-ta-nv i-yu-dv-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi gi-lo na-s-ga-no-la tsa-ne-li-ha, gv-ni-di-yu-s-gi-ni a-yv i-gi-ga-ti-yv-i, nu-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv gi-lo u-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi, ni-ga-di-yu-s-gi-ni u-ni-lu-hi-s-di-yi ga-ne-tli-yv-s-di ge-sv o-da-nv-dv-i.

220310.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏎ ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᏒᏃᏱ ᏥᎦᎷᎪᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏓᎦᎶᏐᏂ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏃᏴᎨᏍᏗ, ᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯᏃ ᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎬ ᏛᎪᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎪᏢᏅᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎪᎲᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
220310.english: But the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night; in the which the heavens shall pass away with a great noise, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat, the earth also and the works that are therein shall be burned up.
220310.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni u-tse-li i-ga a-se da-ga-lu-tsi na-s-gi-ya ga-no-s-gi-s-gi sv-no-yi tsi-ga-lu-go-i, na-hi-yu ga-lv-lo-i da-ga-lo-so-ni u-tsa-ti u-no-yv-ge-s-di, go-tlv-ta-nv-hi-no a-da-we-li-gi-s-gv dv-go-ni, a-le e-lo-hi na-hna-no go-tlv-nv-nv-hi ge-sv a-go-hv-s-do-di ge-se-s-di.

220311.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏗᏒᎲᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏙᎲᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ!
220311.english: Seeing then that all these things shall be dissolved, what manner of persons ought ye to be in all holy conversation and godliness,
220311.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-di-sv-hv-s-di tsi-gi, ni-ga-v ni-tsi-s-ga-nv-na yi-gi i-tsa-le-ni-do-hv-i a-le u-ne-la-nv-hi ga-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv i-tse-hv-i!

220312.cherokee: ᏱᏥᎦᏖᏃᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏱᏣᏚᎵᎭ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎤᏥᏍᏢ ᏨᏛᏗᏒᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎬ ᏛᏗᏌᏂ.
220312.english: Looking for and hasting unto the coming of the day of God, wherein the heavens being on fire shall be dissolved, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat?
220312.phonetic: Yi-tsi-ga-te-no-ha a-le u-tsa-ti yi-tsa-du-li-ha u-lu-hi-s-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li i-ga, na-hi-yu ga-lv-lo u-tsi-s-tlv tsv-dv-di-sv-ni, a-le na-s-gi go-tlv-ta-nv-hi a-da-we-li-gi-s-gv dv-di-sa-ni.

220313.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅ ᎢᏗᎦᏖᏃᎭ ᎢᏤ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏤ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᎲ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
220313.english: Nevertheless we, according to his promise, look for new heavens and a new earth, wherein dwelleth righteousness.
220313.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv u-du-i-s-ta-nv i-di-ga-te-no-ha i-tse ga-lv-lo-i a-le i-tse e-lo-hi na-hna e-hv du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i.

220314.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᏥᎦᏖᏃᎭ, ᎢᏣᏟᏂᎬᏏ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏨᏓᏅᏛ ᎢᏥᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᏄᏓᏓᎸᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏁᏤᎵᏎᎲᎾ.
220314.english: Wherefore, beloved, seeing that ye look for such things, be diligent that ye may be found of him in peace, without spot, and blameless.
220314.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-tsv-ge-yu-i, na-s-gi hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsi-tsi-ga-te-no-ha, i-tsa-tli-ni-gv-si na-s-gi nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tsv-da-nv-dv i-tsi-wa-dv-di-yi nu-da-da-lv-na a-le go-hu-s-di ne-tse-li-se-hv-na.

220315.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏎᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏗᎨᏳᎢ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᏉᎳ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏁᎸ ᏥᏦᏪᎳᏁᎸ;
220315.english: And account that the longsuffering of our Lord is salvation; even as our beloved brother Paul also according to the wisdom given unto him hath written unto you;
220315.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga a-li-s-de-lv-do-di i-tsi-ye-lv-se-s-di; na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo e-di-ge-yu-i i-da-li-nv-tli Quo-la gv-di-s-gv a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv a-tsi-ne-lv tsi-tso-we-la-ne-lv;

220316.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏬᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏕᎬᏁᎰ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ; ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏓᏑᏯ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎪᎵᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏂᏭᎾᏕᎶᏆᎥᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᏓᏂᏁᏟᏴᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏐᎢ ᎪᏪᎵ ᏂᏓᏅᏁᎲᎢ, ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᎤᏂᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ.
220316.english: As also in all his epistles, speaking in them of these things; in which are some things hard to be understood, which they that are unlearned and unstable wrest, as they do also the other scriptures, unto their own destruction.
220316.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo ni-ga-dv na-s-gi tsu-wo-we-la-nv-hi na-s-gi ni-de-gv-ne-ho ka-ne-i-s-di-s-go na-s-gi hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv; na-hna u-da-su-ya i-ga-dv a-s-da-yi-yu go-li-s-di-yi, na-s-gi na ni-wu-na-de-lo-qua-v-na a-le di-ni-wa-na-ga-la da-ni-ne-tli-yv-ha, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo di-so-i go-we-li ni-da-nv-ne-hv-i, u-nv-sv-quo u-ni-dv-di-s-gi ge-sv-i.

220317.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎾᎦᎾ ᎤᏂᎵᏓᏍᏔᏅ ᏕᏣᏘᏂᏒ ᏗᏥᏅᏨᎩ ᏗᏥᏲᏒᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏅᎢ.
220317.english: Ye therefore, beloved, seeing ye know these things before, beware lest ye also, being led away with the error of the wicked, fall from your own stedfastness.
220317.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-hi i-tsv-ge-yu-i, na-s-gi ga-yu-la tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, i-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di, tle-s-di a-ni-na-ga-na u-ni-li-da-s-ta-nv de-tsa-ti-ni-sv di-tsi-nv-tsv-gi di-tsi-yo-sv-gi u-li-ni-gi-dv ni-tsa-dv-nv-i.

220318.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏁᏉᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
220318.english: But grow in grace, and in the knowledge of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ. To him be glory both now and for ever. Amen.
220318.phonetic: I-tsi-ne-quo-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li a-le e-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li a-le I-gi-s-de-li-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv; na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di go-hi ge-sv, a-le u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na.  E-me-nv.
